'''Rogues Gallery''' was an ongoing feature in the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine. A number of issues featured around fourteen illustrations of individuals that could be used as character images in the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. Each issue contained a theme that was illustrated by a new artist.

==Star Wars Gamer 2: Pilots==
by [[Vinod Rams]]
*A Human male
*A Wookiee male
*A Mon Calamari male
*A Human male
*A Sullustan male
*An Omwati female
*A Rodian male
*A Twi'lek male
*A Human female
*A Trandoshan male
*A Gungan male
*A Human female
*A Cerean male
*A Human male
